description_long: This is a black aluminum beverage can with a matte finish, featuring bold branding and text in white and orange. The front displays the word 'MagicCola' in a large, cursive orange font, with 'STARK' in bold white block letters vertically aligned. The can is decorated with small white bubbles and French text, including 'La boisson des mecs en place' around the upper rim. The back side contains a nutrition facts label and additional branding details. The can has a standard pull-tab opening on top, typical of soft drink cans. There are no visible signs of damage, and the surface appears clean and undented.
description: A black aluminum soda can with bold 'MagicCola' and 'STARK' branding, white and orange text, and a standard pull-tab top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'MagicCola' logo in orange script and 'STARK' in bold white, with French text and decorative bubbles.
description_view_1: The back view highlights the nutrition facts label, barcode, and additional branding, with 'STARK' visible vertically.
description_view_2: This side view shows mostly the nutrition label and a partial view of the 'MagicCola' logo, with less branding visible.
description_view_3: This view features the 'STARK' logo vertically and the 'MagicCola' script partially, along with the French slogan at the top.
attribute_label_or_branding: The can features 'MagicCola' in large orange cursive, 'STARK' in bold white block letters, and French text 'La boisson des mecs en place' in white around the top. There is also a nutrition facts label and barcode on the back.
